properties.name: Lien Cang A5 Street
properties.description: Located in District 7, Lien Cang A5 Street is a quiet residential street that offers a peaceful atmosphere. The area is known for its well-planned urban layout and proximity to the Crescent Mall and Saigon River, making it a desirable location for families.

properties.name: Lien Cang A5 Street
properties.description: In District 7, Lien Cang A5 Street is a residential thoroughfare characterized by tranquil surroundings. The street is part of a developing area that boasts modern conveniences and is close to leisure spaces along the river.

properties.name: Huynh Tan Phat Street
properties.description: Sitting in District 7, Huynh Tan Phat Street is a significant primary road known for its two lanes and relatively high speed limit of 60 km/h. This street is bustling with local shops and eateries, leading to various residential complexes.

properties.name: RMN Street
properties.description: Located in District 7, RMN Street is an unclassified road with two lanes that provides access to nearby residential areas. Its asphalt surface makes it accessible for vehicles, while the surrounding neighborhoods contribute to a residential vibe.

properties.name: N1 Street
properties.description: N1 Street in District 7 is a peaceful residential road known for its family-friendly environment. The area is surrounded by parks and local amenities, providing a relaxed suburban feel despite the proximity to urban centers.

properties.name: D2 Street
properties.description: D2 Street is a welcoming residential road located in District 7, featuring a community-oriented atmosphere. The street is lined with homes and small shops, reflecting the vibrant local life and fostering a sense of neighborhood.

properties.name: Sang Tao Street
properties.description: Situated in District 7, Sang Tao Street is a two-lane residential road that encourages local connectivity. The street's atmosphere is defined by its close-knit community and access to recreational areas.

properties.name: ASH Street
properties.description: ASH Street in District 7 is a tertiary road that facilitates low-speed traffic, with a maximum speed of 30 km/h. The area surrounding this street is quite lively, making it a friendly neighborhood thoroughfare.

properties.name: Nguyen Van Linh Avenue
properties.description: Nguyen Van Linh Avenue is a primary thoroughfare located in District 7, known for its significant role in connecting various urban areas. This wide road, with a speed limit of 60 km/h, is lined with businesses and leads to larger commercial hubs in the vicinity.

properties.name: Nguyen Van Linh Avenue
properties.description: Also located in District 7, Nguyen Van Linh Avenue is another segment of this major road that supports heavy traffic with its two lanes. This bustling avenue is integral to the city's transport infrastructure, surrounded by a variety of shops and office complexes.

properties.name: Tate Street
properties.description: Tate Street is a quaint residential area located in District 3. The atmosphere here is peaceful, with trees lining the streets, and it is close to several cafes and small local shops that add to the neighborhood's charm.

properties.name: Cầu Tân Thuận 2
properties.description: Cầu Tân Thuận 2 is a primary road in District 7, known for its significant traffic flow during rush hours. This street connects various commercial areas and offers easy access to the scenic views of the Saigon River, making it a vital route for commuters and locals alike.

properties.name: Street No. 22
properties.description: Street No. 22 is a serene residential street in District 2, characterized by peaceful surroundings and family homes. It is conveniently located near several parks, creating a welcoming atmosphere for families and joggers.

properties.name: Jax Street
properties.description: Jax Street is a quiet residential lane situated in District 3. This street is known for its sense of community, with friendly neighbors and close proximity to local markets that sell fresh produce and handmade goods.

properties.name: Huỳnh Tấn Phát Street
properties.description: This primary road in District 7 leads to Cầu Phú Xuân 2. It’s a major thoroughfare lined with modern apartments and vibrant shops, and it's known for its lively atmosphere.

properties.name: Huỳnh Tấn Phát Street
properties.description: Another section of the primary road in District 7, Huỳnh Tấn Phát Street is a vital route that connects various neighborhoods and offers easy access to nearby parks and riverside views.

properties.name: Cầu Tân Thuận 2 Street
properties.description: Located in District 7, Cầu Tân Thuận 2 Street is an essential passageway featuring asphalt roads that facilitate quick transit. Nearby, the Tan Thuan Industrial Zone contributes significantly to the area’s economy.

properties.name: Nguyễn Văn Linh Boulevard
properties.description: This prominent primary road in District 7 is known for its modern infrastructure and business hubs, making it a key location for commerce and transit in Ho Chi Minh City, with various amenities lining its route.

properties.name: Huỳnh Tấn Phát Street
properties.description: A significant road in District 7, Huỳnh Tấn Phát Street connects neighborhoods and features a variety of local dining options, enhancing the vibrant street life.

properties.name: Đường Huỳnh Tấn Phát
properties.description: This major roadway in District 7 is integral to local traffic, offering access to various shopping centers and cultural sites, blending modernity with traditional Saigon charm.

properties.name: Nguyễn Văn Linh Boulevard
properties.description: With three lanes, this bustling road in District 7 is a lifeline for the city, providing quick access to key districts and showcasing the dynamic urban landscape, marked by modern architecture.

properties.name: Huỳnh Tấn Phát Street
properties.description: Another extension of Huỳnh Tấn Phát Street in District 7, it is essential for travelers heading toward Cầu Phú Xuân 2 and captures the vibrant essence of the local urban culture.

properties.name: Lưu Trường Lưu Street
properties.description: Situated in District 4, Lưu Trường Lưu is a tertiary road characterized by its quieter atmosphere, lined with local houses and small businesses, reflecting a more traditional side of Saigon.

properties.name: Nguyen Van Linh Boulevard
properties.description: Located in District 7, Nguyen Van Linh Boulevard is a major thoroughfare that connects various commercial centers and residential areas. It is known for its bustling atmosphere with shopping malls and restaurants lining the street.

properties.name: Nguyen Van Linh Boulevard
properties.description: This section of Nguyen Van Linh in District 7 features two lanes and a speed limit of 50 km/h. It's a vital route for both locals and visitors, offering access to modern urban developments, including shopping complexes.

properties.name: Nguyen Van Linh Boulevard
properties.description: Heading towards Xã Nhà Bè from District 7, this one-lane stretch of Nguyen Van Linh serves both commercial and residential traffic. The area is characterized by its proximity to several parks and river views.

properties.name: Nguyen Van Linh Boulevard
properties.description: In District 7, this two-lane portion of Nguyen Van Linh permits speeds up to 60 km/h. It reflects the modern urban landscape with a mix of corporate offices and leisure facilities, making it a key artery of the city.

properties.name: Tan Thuan Street
properties.description: Situated in District 7, Tan Thuan Street is a tertiary road that leads to the bustling export processing zones. It has three lanes and connects many industrial sites, contributing to the area's economic dynamism.

properties.name: Nguyen Van Linh Boulevard
properties.description: This section of Nguyen Van Linh in District 7 features two lanes and carries a lot of traffic, as it underlines the importance of this road for commuters and businesses alike, interspersed with greenery and cityscape.

properties.name: Nguyen Van Linh Boulevard
properties.description: This three-lane stretch of Nguyen Van Linh in District 7 allows for speeds up to 60 km/h. It is one of the city's lifelines, integrating various urban functions and promoting a vibrant, fast-paced lifestyle.

properties.name: Tan Thuan 2 Bridge
properties.description: This vital connection in District 7, Tan Thuan 2 Bridge, is frequented by commuters traveling to and from industrial zones. It boasts an asphalt surface and provides scenic views of the surrounding environment.

properties.name: Tan Thuan 2 Bridge
properties.description: The Tan Thuan 2 Bridge is another crucial infrastructural component situated in District 7, linking various areas of the city. Its pathway is always bustling with both vehicle and pedestrian traffic.

properties.name: Nguyen Van Linh Boulevard
properties.description: In District 7, this two-lane segment of Nguyen Van Linh has a maximum speed limit of 60 km/h. It serves as a primary route for access to major shopping destinations and business districts, creating a dynamic urban environment.

properties.name: Nguyễn Văn Linh
properties.description: Nguyen Van Linh Street is located in District 7 (Quận 7) and serves as a major thoroughfare connecting the city with the expanding urban landscape of Phu My Hung. This bustling street is lined with modern shopping centers and is known for its vibrant atmosphere and contemporary architecture.

properties.name: Đường Nhánh Cầu Tân Thuận 2
properties.description: Located in District 7 (Quận 7), this secondary road is part of the Tan Thuan Export Processing Zone, which is pivotal for local commerce. The serene environment here contrasts with the dynamic economic activities, offering both business and residential areas.

properties.name: Nguyễn Văn Linh
properties.description: Nguyen Van Linh Street, also situated in District 7 (Quận 7), is integral to the flow of traffic in this region. The street offers easy access to the bustling commercial areas nearby, characterized by a mix of residential and business developments.

properties.name: Nguyễn Văn Linh
properties.description: This segment of Nguyen Van Linh Street in District 7 (Quận 7) showcases a quieter side of the thoroughfare with local shops and cafes catering to residents. The street plays a vital role in the community's daily life.

properties.name: UGU
properties.description: UGU Street is an unclassified road likely in District 2 (Quận 2), often less traveled. Surrounded by local homes and small businesses, it reflects the residential charm of the area, offering a peaceful retreat from the busier main roads.

properties.name: Nguyễn Văn Linh
properties.description: This section of Nguyen Van Linh Street in District 7 (Quận 7) is bustling and vital for transportation. It connects various commercial centers and is known for its accessibility to amenities, contributing to the area's urban appeal.

properties.name: Đường Sáng Tạo
properties.description: Sang Tao Street, located in District 8 (Quận 8), resonates with a residential atmosphere, showcasing local Vietnamese culture through its modest homes and community interactions. It's a pleasant area for strolls and casual gatherings.

properties.name: KAM
properties.description: KAM Street is a small residential street in District 8 (Quận 8) characterized by its intimate community vibe. Nearby markets and local eateries add to the charm and accessibility for families living in the area.

properties.name: Gage
properties.description: Gage Street, also in District 8 (Quận 8), features a peaceful residential environment with close-knit households. It is a reflection of daily life in Saigon away from the hustle and bustle of the central districts.

properties.name: Đường số 2
properties.description: So 2 Street is located in District 2 (Quận 2). This residential pathway is quiet and lined with homes, making it an ideal spot for families. It embodies the suburban charm of the city while still being close to urban amenities.

properties.name: Street 2
properties.description: Situated in District 2 (Quận 2), Street 2 is a quiet residential road that reflects the growing urban development of this area. Close to popular landmarks like the Vincom Mega Mall Thao Dien and the scenic Thao Dien neighborhood, it offers a peaceful atmosphere amidst increasing urbanization.

properties.name: Lien Cang A5 Street
properties.description: Found in District 9 (Quận 9), Lien Cang A5 Street is a tertiary road that connects several residential communities. This area is known for its greenery and proximity to tech parks, creating a blend of modern living and natural surroundings. The street is a vital link for locals heading towards various educational and technological hubs.
